description: Verify with positive and negative tests

annotations.description: AC: failure reproduced with logged steps and UTC timestamps
Pushed to main. Waiting for Netlify deploy to complete before testing.
FAILED: Still redirecting to generic thank-you page. Researching Netlify docs for proper Forms redirect handling.
Key finding: Rewrites (status 200) keep original URL. Our rule is a rewrite, not a redirect. This won't change the URL bar.
CRITICAL: Form only saving metadata, not actual form fields. No email, firstName, etc. captured!
ROOT CAUSE: Astro strips data-netlify attributes during build. Forms not recognized by Netlify, only metadata saved.
AC: minimal script and exact inputs saved and runnable
AC: failure reproduced with logged steps and UTC timestamps
User reported: getting generic thank you page, not custom one. Need to identify which page is rendering.

description: Collect minimal failing case and exact inputs

annotations.description: AC: minimal script and exact inputs saved and runnable
Found: Two thank-you pages exist. Form action='/survey/thank-you' but Netlify redirecting to '/thank-you' instead
AC: failing layer narrowed with proof
Checking: Netlify Forms may have success_action_redirect configured in dashboard overriding form action attribute
ROOT CAUSE FOUND: Root netlify.toml has redirect '/*' to '/index.html' which is overriding form action redirect!
AC: mechanism and scope stated, falsifiable
Hypothesis: Catch-all redirect '/*' to '/index.html' intercepts form success redirect. Need to add exception BEFORE catch-all.
